text: ' hmsh' 'shr chzh chbqvq hnby'
b 'd 'nh yhvh shv'ty vl' tshm' 'z'q 'lykh chms vl' tvshy'
g lmh tr'ny 'vn v'ml tbyt vshd vchms lngdy vyhy ryb vmdvn ysh'
d 'l khn tfvg tvrh vl' yts' lntsch mshft khy rsh' mkhtyr 't htsdyq 'l khn yts' mshft m'ql
h r'v bgvym vhbytv vhtmhv tmhv khy f'l f'l bymykhm l' t'mynv khy ysfr
v khy hnny mqym 't hkhshdym hgvy hmr vhnmhr hhvlkh lmrchby 'rts lrsht mshkhnvt l' lv
z 'ym vnvr' hv' mmnv mshftv vsh'tv yts'
ch vqlv mnmrym svsyv vchdv mz'by 'rb vfshv frshyv vfrshyv mrchvq yb'v--y'fv khnshr chsh l'khvl
t khlh lchms ybv' mgmt fnyhm qdymh vy'sf khchvl shby
y vhv' bmlkhym ytqls vrznym mshchq lv hv' lkhl mbtsr yshchq vytsbr 'fr vylkhdh
y' 'z chlf rvch vy'br v'shm zv khchv l'lhv
yb hlv' 'th mqdm yhvh 'lhy qdshy--l' nmvt yhvh lmshft shmtv vtsvr lhvkhych ysdtv
yg thvr 'ynym mr'vt r' vhbyt 'l 'ml l' tvkhl lmh tbyt bvgdym--tchrysh bbl' rsh' tsdyq mmnv
yd vt'shh 'dm khdgy hym--khrmsh l' mshl bv
tv khlh bchkhh h'lh--ygrhv bchrmv vy'sfhv bmkhmrtv 'l khn yshmch vygyl
tz 'l khn yzbch lchrmv vyqtr lmkhmrtv khy bhmh shmn chlqv vm'khlv br'h
yz h'l khn yryq chrmv vtmyd lhrg gvym l' ychmvl {s}
' 'l mshmrty ''mdh v'tytsbh 'l mtsvr v'tsfh lr'vt mh ydbr by vmh 'shyb 'l tvkhchty
b vy'nny yhvh vy'mr khtb chzvn vb'r 'l hlchvt--lm'n yrvts qvr' bv
g khy 'vd chzvn lmv'd vyfch lqts vl' ykhzb 'm ytmhmh chkhh lv--khy b' yb' l' y'chr
d hnh 'flh l' yshrh nfshv bv vtsdyq b'mvntv ychyh {s}
h v'f khy hyyn bgd gbr yhyr vl' ynvh 'shr hrchyb khsh'vl nfshv vhv' khmvt vl' yshb' vy'sf 'lyv khl hgvym vyqbts 'lyv khl h'mym
v hlv' 'lh khlm 'lyv mshl ysh'v vmlytsh chydvt lv vy'mr hvy hmrbh l' lv--'d mty vmkhbyd 'lyv 'btyt
z hlv' ft' yqvmv nshkhykh vyqtsv mz'z'ykh vhyyt lmshsvt lmv
ch khy 'th shlvt gvym rbym yshlvkh khl ytr 'mym mdmy 'dm vchms 'rts qryh vkhl yshby bh {f}
t hvy bts' bts' r'--lbytv lshvm bmrvm qnv lhntsl mkhf r'
y y'tst bsht lbytkh qtsvt 'mym rbym vchvt' nfshkh
y' khy 'bn mqyr tz'q vkhfys m'ts y'nnh {f}
yb hvy bnh 'yr bdmym vkhvnn qryh b'vlh
yg hlv' hnh m't yhvh tsb'vt vyyg'v 'mym bdy 'sh vl'mym bdy ryq y'fv
yd khy tml' h'rts ld't 't khbvd yhvh khmym ykhsv 'l ym {f}
tv hvy mshqh r'hv msfch chmtkh v'f shkhr--lm'n hbyt 'l m'vryhm
tz shb't qlvn mkhbvd shth gm 'th vh'rl tsvb 'lykh khvs ymyn yhvh vqyqlvn 'l khbvdkh
yz khy chms lbnvn ykhskh vshd bhmvt ychytn mdmy 'dm vchms 'rts qryh vkhl yshby bh
ych mh hv'yl fsl khy fslv ytsrv--mskhh vmvrh shqr khy btch ytsr ytsrv 'lyv l'shvt 'lylym 'lmym {s}
yt hvy 'mr l'ts hqytsh 'vry l'bn dvmm hv' yvrh--hnh hv' tfvsh zhb vkhsf vkhl rvch 'yn bqrbv
kh vyhvh bhykhl qdshv hs mfnyv khl h'rts {s}
' tflh lchbqvq hnby'--'l shgynvt
b yhvh shm'ty shm'kh yr'ty--yhvh f'lkh bqrb shnym chyyhv bqrb shnym tvdy' brgz rchm tzkhvr
g 'lvh mtymn ybv' vqdvsh mhr f'rn slh khsh shmym hvdv vthltv ml'h h'rts
d vngh kh'vr thyh qrnym mydv lv vshm chbyvn 'zh
h lfnyv ylkh dbr vyts' rshf lrglyv
v 'md vymdd 'rts r'h vytr gvym vytftstsv hrry 'd shchv gb'vt 'vlm hlykhvt 'vlm lv
z tcht 'vn r'yty 'hly khvshn yrgzvn yry'vt 'rts mdyn
ch hbnhrym chrh yhvh--'m bnhrym 'fkh 'm bym 'brtkh khy trkhb 'l svsykh mrkhbtykh yshv'h
t 'ryh t'vr qshtkh shb'vt mtvt 'mr slh nhrvt tbq' 'rts
y r'vkh ychylv hrym zrm mym 'br ntn thvm qvlv rvm ydyhv nsh'
y' shmsh yrch 'md zblh l'vr chtsykh yhlkhv lngh brq chnytkh
yb bz'm tts'd 'rts b'f tdvsh gvym
yg yts't lysh' 'mkh lysh' 't mshychkh mchtst r'sh mbyt rsh' 'rvt ysvd 'd tsv'r slh {f}
yd nqbt bmtyv r'sh frzv ys'rv lhfytsny 'lytstm khmv l'khl 'ny bmstr
tv drkht bym svsykh chmr mym rbym
tz shm'ty vtrgz btny lqvl tsllv shfty--ybv' rqb b'tsmy vtchty 'rgz 'shr 'nvch lyvm tsrh l'lvt l'm ygvdnv
yz khy t'nh l' tfrch v'yn ybvl bgfnym--khchsh m'shh zyt vshdmvt l' 'shh 'khl gzr mmkhlh ts'n v'yn bqr brftym
ych v'ny byhvh ''lvzh 'gylh b'lhy ysh'y
yt yhvh 'dny chyly vyshm rgly kh'ylvt v'l bmvty ydrkhny lmntsch bngynvty {sh}
